ddls:
CREATE TABLE "practicals" (
  "practical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practical assignment */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date the assignment was given to students */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the practical assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assignment */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submission */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number in the course syllabus */,
  "signature_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a signature is required for submission */,
  "max_attempts" INTEGER /* The maximum number of attempts allowed for the assignment */,
  "is_group_assignment" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment can be completed in groups */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* The maximum size of the group if the assignment is a group assignment */,
  "grading_scheme" TEXT /* The grading scheme used for the assignment (e.g., pass/fail, percentage, letter grade) */,
  "is_graded" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment is graded */,
  "is_submitted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment has been submitted by any student */,
  "is_late_submission_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether late submissions are allowed */,
  "late_submission_penalty" REAL /* The penalty (in percentage) for late submissions */,
  "instructor_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the instructor regarding the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "practical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practical assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the submitted assignment */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the assignment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* The attempt number of the submission */,
  "is_late" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the submission was late */,
  "late_days" INTEGER /* The number of days the submission was late */,
  "is_resubmission" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the submission is a resubmission */,
  "resubmission_reason" TEXT /* The reason for resubmission */,
  "is_graded" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the submission has been graded */,
  "is_final_submission" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the submission is the final submission for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_practical_id FOREIGN KEY ("practical_id") REFERENCES practicals ("practical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* The student's identification number or matriculation number */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the student */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is currently active in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* The date the student enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* The semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall 2023, Spring 2024) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year in which the course is offered */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* The unique code of the course (e.g., CS101, CS202) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* The number of credits the course is worth */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the course */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is offered online */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "instructor_number" TEXT /* The instructor's identification number */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the instructor (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* The location of the instructor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* The office hours of the instructor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the instructor is currently active */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* The date the instructor was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "practical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practical assignment the resource is associated with */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., code example, dataset, reading material) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_size" INTEGER /* The size of the resource file in bytes */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the resource is mandatory for the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the resource was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who created the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_practical_id FOREIGN KEY ("practical_id") REFERENCES practicals ("practical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "practical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practical assignment the data is for */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* The size of the data file in bytes */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data file is mandatory for the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the data file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the data file was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who created the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_data_practical_id FOREIGN KEY ("practical_id") REFERENCES practicals ("practical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the feedback is for */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Detailed comment from the instructor */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating or score given to the submission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the feedback was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feedback is visible to all students or just the submitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission the grade is for */,
  "grade" REAL /* Final grade for the submission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the grade was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the grade was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who assigned the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* The date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the enrollment is currently active */,
  "dropped_date" TEXT /* The date the student dropped the course, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_reuse" (
  "reuse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reuse instance */,
  "original_practical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original practical assignment */,
  "new_practical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new practical assignment created from the original */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the new practical assignment is used */,
  "reuse_date" TEXT /* The date the assignment was reused */,
  "reason_for_reuse" TEXT /* The reason for reusing the assignment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who reused the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reuse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_reuse_new_practical_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_practical_id") REFERENCES practicals ("practical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_reuse_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_reuse_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_reuse_original_practical_id FOREIGN KEY ("original_practical_id") REFERENCES practicals ("practical_id")
)
